subcodes.first_line: Say: O concourse of divines, mystics and rulers! Fear ye God and be fair in your judgment of this Cause which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بگو یا معشر العلماء و العرفاء و الامرآء اتقوا الله و انصفوا فی هذا الامر الذی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity
